allowedWrites: evidence files under mission evidence directory

assertions.title: Concurrent-write safety for session.json under atomic writes + read cache

steps.expected: 50 randomized interleavings pass with no torn JSON/temp artifacts and cache reads observed
steps.observed: Pass line: `concurrent write safety > 50 randomized interleavings of two saveSessionState calls avoid torn JSON and temp artifacts`; summary `1 pass / 0 fail`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) concurrent write safety > 50 randomized interleavings of two saveSessionState calls avoid torn JSON and temp artifacts

assertions.title: Markdown rendering parity before/after incremental rendering

steps.expected: 10-feature fixture stays byte-identical to golden; mutation rewrites only changed feature doc + index
steps.observed: Pass line: `cross-area markdown parity > 10-feature fixture preserves golden bytes and rewrites only the changed feature doc plus index`; summary `1 pass / 0 fail`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) cross-area markdown parity > 10-feature fixture preserves golden bytes and rewrites only the changed feature doc plus index

assertions.title: Idempotent save issues zero doc writes

steps.expected: Second save with unchanged session issues zero markdown writes
steps.observed: Pass line: `idempotent save issues zero markdown writes on the second call`; summary `6 pass / 0 fail`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) incremental markdown rendering > idempotent save issues zero markdown writes on the second call

assertions.title: Single-feature mutation rewrites only that feature doc + index

steps.expected: Exactly two markdown writes on mutation: index.md and changed feature doc
steps.observed: Pass line: `single-feature mutation rewrites only index.md and the changed feature doc`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) incremental markdown rendering > single-feature mutation rewrites only index.md and the changed feature doc

steps.expected: 20-feature fixture docs match committed golden bytes
steps.observed: Pass line: `render snapshot parity > matches committed bytes for save-session-20-features`; summary `6 pass / 0 fail`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) render snapshot parity > matches committed bytes for save-session-20-features

assertions.title: `mkdir` not re-issued for a prepared workspace

steps.expected: After ensureWorkspace, 10 saves issue at most two mkdir calls
steps.observed: Pass line: `workspace mkdir caching > 10 sequential saveSession calls issue at most two mkdir calls after ensureWorkspace`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) workspace mkdir caching > 10 sequential saveSession calls issue at most two mkdir calls after ensureWorkspace

assertions.title: Session read cache hits on repeated load

steps.expected: Second loadSession reads session.json once total and returns equal data
steps.observed: Pass line: `second loadSession with no mutation issues zero additional session.json reads`; summary `3 pass / 0 fail`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) session read cache > second loadSession with no mutation issues zero additional session.json reads

assertions.title: Read cache invalidates on in-process mutation

steps.expected: loadSession after saveSession returns mutated state
steps.observed: Pass line: `loadSession returns the in-process saveSession mutation`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) session read cache > loadSession returns the in-process saveSession mutation

assertions.title: Read cache invalidates on external mtime/size change

steps.expected: External rewrite + mtime bump invalidates cached snapshot
steps.observed: Pass line: `loadSession invalidates cached content after external session.json rewrite and mtime bump`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) session read cache > loadSession invalidates cached content after external session.json rewrite and mtime bump

steps.expected: Full suite exits 0 with no failures
steps.observed: Summary shows `230 pass`, `0 fail`, and `EXIT_CODE=0` across 37 files.

evidence.outputSummary: 230 pass / 0 fail; Ran 230 tests across 37 files.

steps.expected: Empty-plan output is byte-identical to committed golden and emits no feature docs
steps.observed: Pass line: `render snapshot parity > matches committed bytes for empty-plan`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) render snapshot parity > matches committed bytes for empty-plan

steps.expected: Single-feature index + feature doc are byte-identical to committed goldens
steps.observed: Pass line: `render snapshot parity > matches committed bytes for single-feature`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) render snapshot parity > matches committed bytes for single-feature

assertions.title: All-completed plan renders without active-feature section

steps.action: Run `bun test tests/runtime/render-snapshot.test.ts` and `bun test tests/runtime/render-incremental.test.ts`
steps.expected: All-completed output matches golden and omits active-feature section
steps.observed: Pass lines: `matches committed bytes for all-completed` and `all-completed plan omits an active feature section in index.md`; both logs `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: Golden parity + explicit no-active-section assertion both passed.

assertions.title: `plan: null` (post-replan) rendering prunes stale feature docs

steps.expected: Post-replan sync removes all previously rendered feature docs
steps.observed: Pass line: `post-replan sync prunes all stale feature docs when the plan becomes null`; `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: (pass) incremental markdown rendering > post-replan sync prunes all stale feature docs when the plan becomes null

steps.action: Run `bun test tests/runtime/render-incremental.test.ts` and `bun test tests/runtime/render-snapshot.test.ts`
steps.expected: 100-feature fixture renders successfully and unchanged second save issues zero markdown writes
steps.observed: Pass lines: `hundred-feature fixture renders and second save issues zero markdown writes` and `matches committed bytes for hundred-features`; both logs `EXIT_CODE=0`.

evidence.outputSummary: hundred-feature parity and zero-write second-save assertions passed.

summary: Tested 15 assertions (VAL-CROSS-004, VAL-CROSS-008, VAL-PERF-006, VAL-PERF-007, VAL-PERF-008, VAL-PERF-009, VAL-PERF-010, VAL-PERF-011, VAL-PERF-012, VAL-PERF-016, VAL-PERF-018, VAL-PERF-019, VAL-PERF-020, VAL-PERF-021, VAL-PERF-022): 15 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
